name: Generative AI Art
description: Generate full-screen abstract art for your split-flap display using an LLM. Each piece is a unique, thought-out composition using the board's 8-color palette.
author: FiestaBoard Team

api_base_url.title: API Base URL
api_base_url.description: Base URL for an OpenAI-compatible chat completions endpoint (e.g. https://api.openai.com/v1 or http://localhost:11434/v1 for Ollama)

api_key.title: API Key
api_key.description: API key for the endpoint. Use any value (e.g. 'ollama') for local endpoints that don't require auth.

model.title: Model
model.description: Model to use for art generation

device_type.title: Device Type
device_type.description: Target display size: flagship (6 rows × 22 cols) or note (3 rows × 15 cols)

temperature.title: Temperature
temperature.description: LLM sampling temperature (0 = deterministic, 2 = very random). 1.0–1.4 works well for art.

refresh_seconds.title: Refresh Interval (seconds)
refresh_seconds.description: How often to generate a new art piece. Minimum 300 seconds (5 minutes).

history_size.title: History Size
history_size.description: Number of generated art pieces to remember (1–500)

persist_history.title: Persist History
persist_history.description: Save art history to disk so it survives restarts

themes.title: Custom Themes
themes.description: Optional list of theme prompts. Leave empty to use the built-in theme pool.

extra_instructions.title: Extra Prompt Instructions
extra_instructions.description: Additional instructions appended to the system prompt (e.g. 'favor cool colors' or 'avoid red entirely')

env_vars.name: GENERATIVE_AI_ART_API_KEY
env_vars.description: API key for the OpenAI-compatible endpoint

env_vars.name: GENERATIVE_AI_ART_API_BASE_URL
env_vars.description: Base URL for the chat completions endpoint

env_vars.name: GENERATIVE_AI_ART_DEVICE_TYPE
env_vars.description: Target device type: flagship or note

env_vars.name: GENERATIVE_AI_ART_HISTORY_SIZE
env_vars.description: Number of art pieces to retain in history

art.description: Full-board color art pattern ready for display

theme.description: Theme or concept of the current art piece

description.description: Short artist's description of the current piece
description.example: Radiating rings of cool blues fading to deep violet

model.description: LLM model that generated this piece

generated_at.description: ISO timestamp when this piece was generated

history_count.description: Number of art pieces in history
